mammoth.name: MAMMOTH MoE-LoRA
mammoth.description: Replaces the input Linear in MIL models with a MoE-LoRA patch embed (num_experts × num_slots slots).

cellpose.name: Cellpose nuclei/cell segmentation

model_type.help: Pretrained backbone. 'cpsam' (default) is the SAM-based generalist; 'nuclei' is H&E-biased; 'cyto3' for brightfield cytoplasm.

diameter.help: Target object diameter in pixels at the patch's resolution. null = auto-estimate per image.

flow_threshold.help: Flow consistency threshold. Lower values reject more masks (stricter).

cellprob_threshold.help: Cell probability threshold. Raise (e.g. 1.0) to reject dim/ambiguous detections.

niter.help: Dynamics iterations. 0 = auto. Raise (e.g. 2000) for large or crowded objects.

min_size.help: Minimum mask area in pixels. Smaller masks are discarded.

tile_norm.help: Per-tile (128px) normalization — recommended for WSI patches with uneven staining.

cellpose.description: Pretrained cellpose model for nuclei / cell instance segmentation. Runs at inference time over patches of a dataset; outputs per-patch instance masks and counts.
